title: Fire Hydrant Flow Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for evaluating fire hydrant flow capacity, system pressure losses, and compliance with NFPA and ISO standards. Supports Lean Six Sigma DMAIC projects and WERC warehouse fire protection audits.

inputs.label: Static Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Measured at hydrant outlet with no flow. Used to determine available system pressure per NFPA 291.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured at hydrant outlet with no flow. Used to determine available system pressure per NFPA 291.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidrant çıkışında akış yokken ölçülür. NFPA 291'e göre mevcut sistem basıncını belirlemek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessen am Hydrantenauslass ohne Durchfluss. Wird verwendet, um den verfügbaren Systemdruck gemäß NFPA 291 zu bestimmen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurée à la sortie de la bouche d'incendie sans débit. Utilisée pour déterminer la pression disponible du système selon la NFPA 291.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medido en la salida del hidrante sin flujo. Se utiliza para determinar la presión disponible del sistema según NFPA 291.

inputs.label: Residual Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Pressure measured while hydrant is flowing at test rate. Indicates system capacity under demand.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure measured while hydrant is flowing at test rate. Indicates system capacity under demand.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidrant test debisinde akarken ölçülen basınç. Talep altında sistem kapasitesini gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Druck, der am Hydranten gemessen wird, während er mit der Testdurchflussrate fließt. Zeigt die Systemkapazität unter Last an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression mesurée pendant que la bouche d'incendie débite au débit d'essai. Indique la capacité du système en situation de demande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión medida mientras el hidrante fluye a la tasa de prueba. Indica la capacidad del sistema bajo demanda.

inputs.label: Test Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Flow rate measured during hydrant flow test using pitot gauge or flow meter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Flow rate measured during hydrant flow test using pitot gauge or flow meter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidrant akış testi sırasında pitot göstergesi veya debimetre kullanılarak ölçülen debi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchflussrate, die während des Hydranten-Durchflusstests mit einem Pitot-Rohr oder Durchflussmesser gemessen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit mesuré lors de l'essai de débit de la bouche d'incendie à l'aide d'un tube de Pitot ou d'un débitmètre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal medido durante la prueba de flujo del hidrante usando un tubo de pitot o caudalímetro.

inputs.label: Supply Pipe Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Nominal diameter of the main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.

label_i18n.es: Diámetro de la tubería de suministro

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal diameter of the main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidrantı besleyen ana besleme borusunun nominal çapı. Sürtünme kaybını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nenndurchmesser des Hauptversorgungsrohrs, das den Hydranten speist. Beeinflusst den Reibungsverlust.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre nominal de la conduite principale alimentant la bouche d'incendie. Affecte la perte de charge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro nominal de la tubería principal que alimenta al hidrante. Afecta la pérdida por fricción.

inputs.label: Supply Pipe Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from water main to hydrant. Used in friction loss calculations.

label_i18n.es: Longitud de la tubería de suministro

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from water main to hydrant. Used in friction loss calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Su kaynağından hidrant mesafesi. Sürtünme kaybı hesaplamalarında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Entfernung von der Wasserhauptleitung zum Hydranten. Wird für Reibungsverlustberechnungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance entre la conduite d'eau et le bouche d'incendie. Utilisée dans les calculs de perte de charge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia desde la red de agua hasta el hidrante. Se utiliza en cálculos de pérdida por fricción.

inputs.label: Hazen-Williams C Factor
inputs.businessContext: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. Per ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. Per ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru pürüzlülük katsayısı. Yeni çelik için 140, eski dökme demir için 100. ISO 10803 ve NFPA 13'e göre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohrrauigkeitskoeffizient. 140 für neuen Stahl, 100 für alten Gusseisen. Gemäß ISO 10803 und NFPA 13.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de rugosité de la conduite. 140 pour l'acier neuf, 100 pour la fonte ancienne. Selon ISO 10803 et NFPA 13.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de rugosidad de la tubería. 140 para acero nuevo, 100 para hierro fundido viejo. Según ISO 10803 y NFPA 13.

inputs.label: Elevation Difference
inputs.businessContext: Height difference between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height difference between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Su kaynağı ile hidrant arasındaki yükseklik farkı. Hidrant kaynaktan yüksekte ise pozitif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhendifferenz zwischen Wasserquelle und Hydrant. Positiv, wenn der Hydrant oberhalb der Quelle liegt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence de hauteur entre la source d'eau et le bouche d'incendie. Positive si le bouche est au-dessus de la source.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferencia de altura entre la fuente de agua y el hidrante. Positivo si el hidrante está por encima de la fuente.

inputs.label: Number of Hydrants in Test
inputs.businessContext: Number of hydrants flowing simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.

label_i18n.fr: Nombre de bouches d'incendie en essai

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hydrants flowing simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Test sırasında aynı anda akan hidrant sayısı. Toplam talebi etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der gleichzeitig während des Tests fließenden Hydranten. Beeinflusst den Gesamtbedarf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de bouches d'incendie coulant simultanément pendant l'essai. Affecte la demande totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de hidrantes fluyendo simultáneamente durante la prueba. Afecta la demanda total.

rules.message: Static and residual pressures must be greater than zero.
Residual pressure must be less than static pressure.
Test flow rate must be greater than zero.
Pipe diameter must be at least 2 inches.
Hazen-Williams C factor must be between 60 and 150.

thresholds.message: Available flow is below 500 gpm. May not meet minimum fire suppression requirements.
Pressure loss exceeds 20% of static pressure. System may be undersized.
Flow velocity exceeds 20 ft/s. Risk of water hammer and pipe erosion per ISO 4126.
Significant elevation difference detected. Adjust pressure calculations accordingly.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
